case_title: BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC. VS. MICHAEL N. TIMOG et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $284.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $200.00 AS TO DEFENDANT TIMOG, MICHAEL N.
DECLARATION RE: CCP 1033(B)(2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL FINANCIAL I, INC. SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA, INC.

NOTICE AND MOTION TO CORRECT NAME NUNC PRO TUNC, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL FINANCIAL I, INC. SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA, INC. HEARING SET FOR OCT-19-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL FINANCIAL I, INC. SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TIMOG, MICHAEL N. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-12-2010
DECLARATION OF GLORIA SPEED RE: CCP 585(D) - IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL FINANCIAL I, INC. SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL FINANCIAL I, INC. SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TIMOG, MICHAEL N. $1,485.90 PRINCIPAL, $425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $284.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,195.40, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC'S MOTION TO CORRECT NAME NUNC PRO TUNC (FROM BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC. TO BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC. SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO BENEFICIAL FINANCIAL I INC.) IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-19-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL FINANCIAL I, INC. SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA, INC. SERVED FEB-02-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TIMOG, MICHAEL N.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (NOTICE OF CHANGE ATTY NAME, FIRM NAME AND ADDRESS): ZIMMERMAN, HALLIE N. SUBSTITUTED FOR BOLLERO, BARBARA L. AS ATTORNEY FOR BENEFICIAL FINANCIAL I, INC. SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA, INC.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL FINANCIAL I, INC. SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA, INC.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL FINANCIAL I, INC. SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TIMOG, MICHAEL N.
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT PER ORDER (NUNC PRO TUNC) PLAINTIFF SUED INCORRECTLY AS BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC. TO BE BENEFICIAL FINANCIAL I, INC. SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA, INC.

calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion To Correct Name Nunc Pro Tunc
Off Calendar Oct-19-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC'S MOTION TO CORRECT NAME NUNC PRO TUNC (from Beneficial California Inc. to Beneficial California Inc. successor by merger to Beneficial Financial I Inc.). No appearances on this matter. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
